description: v3-specific assertions on the Tafi 2025 case with the dictamen attachment pruned. Validates ManifestV3.client_email_draft + missing_fields_referenced subset rule per spec § 4.5 + § 6.3.

envelope.rationale: with the dictamen pruned, the agent should signal blocked, not ok
missing_fields must list at least 'dictamen'; agent may add others (e.g., 'memoria')

field_assertions.rationale: v3 contract: a blocked-status manifest MUST populate the draft when missing_fields is non-empty
spec § 6.3: body < 50 chars is a hard reject
spec § 6.3: any forbidden substring is a hard reject
spec § 4.5 + ManifestV3 model_validator: referenced ⊆ envelope's missing_fields

reconciliations._note: v3 slice does not check reconciliations — pruning a doc from a real case may invalidate balance identities. Inherits ok-path checks from parent slice when running v2-shaped trials.
